blended.narrative: Giants Ridge is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. The 14-day outlook shows 12 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 51°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Friday: 2.9" of snow, highs of 29°F. Expect variable conditions.
Sunday: 5" of snow, highs of 21°F. Expect powder.
